intro.p: Use the graph of the polynomial function f(x) below to answer the questions that follow.

item.p: (a) Is the degree of the polynomial even or odd? \underline{\hspace{3cm}}
(b) Is the lead coefficient of the polynomial positive or negative? \underline{\hspace{3cm}}
(c) Is the constant of the polynomial positive or negative? \underline{\hspace{3cm}}
(d) What is the minimum degree of the polynomial? \underline{\hspace{3cm}}

p.em: (For instructor reference, the function equation is {{equation_latex}})
